texto: A prepared mind is always made up; it knows what it thinks and why it thinks that. When it's time to change, it just makes itself up a different way. A really made-up mind--made up properly, knowing what it knows and on what basis it knows it--is open. People close an undecided mind because they're trying to protect those sore uncertainties from getting bumped and scraped.
explicacao: Citação de John Barnese sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “A prepared mind is always made up; it knows what it thinks and why it thinks that. When it's time…” articula reflexao, epistemology, open-minds em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e open-minds.
